title: Batman Fights Dracula
writer: Bert R. Mendoza, Bob Kane, Bram Stoker
actors: Jing Abalos, Dante Rivero, Vivian Lorraine
plot: Mad scientist Doctor Zorba is at his wit's end because of the interference of Batman in his smuggling attempts. Together with his mad fanatic follower Turko, they hatch a plan to bring Dracula back to life by electronic means whic...
